narrative:
Harrison Twp. township has 10,446 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
